command:
set -euo pipefail
printf 'files\n'
ls .github/workflows/release.yml Pinemeter.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj README.md CHANGELOG.md >/dev/null
printf 'official_identity_count='; rg -F 'Developer ID Application: AUTIMO SYSTEMS INC (HMR9RDR6M2)' .github/workflows/release.yml Pinemeter.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj README.md CHANGELOG.md | wc -l | tr -d ' '
printf '\nofficial_team_count='; rg -F 'HMR9RDR6M2' .github/workflows/release.yml Pinemeter.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj README.md CHANGELOG.md | wc -l | tr -d ' '
printf '\ngeneric_identity_matches\n'; rg -n 'CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY\s*=\s*"?Developer ID Application"?\b|APPLE_TEAM_ID|DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=\$|DEVELOPMENT_TEAM = \$' .github/workflows/release.yml Pinemeter.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj README.md CHANGELOG.md || true
printf 'remote_mutation_steps\n'; rg -n 'action-gh-release|git clone|git push|contents: write|workflow_dispatch' .github/workflows/release.yml
